purpose: Food spread on marble with iPad showing menu. Modern lifestyle context.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Lifestyle photography of multiple small plates of {food_descriptor} on white marble countertop with iPad showing menu or recipe in upper portion of frame, hands of person visible holding tablet (face not visible), small ceramic bowls of sauces scattered around, soft natural daylight, shot on 35mm at f/4, no text on screen, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: text on screen
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: T48. Saudi adaptation guidance: For Saudi catering and premium dining. Food Saudi-appropriate — mezze for casual, mandi/kabsa traditional, modern fusion contemporary. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week.
